description: B614 kyltornsvatten reports on ~2-day cadence (215 rows / 424 days, ~95% zero-flow). Bursts up to 504k L/day (e.g. 2025-09-06) are cumulative catchups, not spikes. Counter monotonic; total is correct. Daily-resolution views will look bursty.

Reference formula doc sheet 'KYLTORN V2' exists but has no populated formulas (header only). Current workstream ontology predates the doc and continues to be authoritative. Re-check when the doc is populated.
B611.V2_VM21 cooling-tower make-up flat for 120 days ending 2025-05-01 (winter dormancy). Cooling towers typically off in cold months; this is expected seasonal behaviour, not a data gap.
